title: Summarizing Technical Reports
scenario: Read a technical report (approx. 10-20 pages) and generate a concise 1-paragraph summary. The LLM should identify the main findings, recommendations, and implications for the field. Assume the report is on a technical topic and the authors are experts in the field.
constraints: Must include the report's title and the names of the authors

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the output meets all the constraints provided.
Evaluate the accuracy of the summary, including the main findings, recommendations, and implications for the field.
Assess the use of technical language to accurately convey complex concepts.
Evaluate the formatting of the output, ensuring it is concise and clear.
